boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after vendor bank update?
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Pre-change callback source absent before release

final_answer: ESCALATE. CALL-QUA-071 confirms callback used post-change email thread, not pre-change vendor-master phone. STD-QUA-071-P requires the pre-change callback source in the chain. Boundary remains open; payment release may not proceed.
